curation_notes: Patch commit is a merge commit (3ff02b0) merging the fix branch (4e88b39) into mainline (a4d8ab2). Only one source file was changed: adm_program/modules/ecards/ecard_send.php. The fix adds an (int) cast to the $value from $_POST['ecard_recipients'] before appending to $arrayUsers, which is later used in implode(',', $arrayUsers) inside a SQL IN clause. The vulnerability location was derived from both the advisory description (which explicitly names the file and POST parameter) and the patch diff.
